calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-26-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: EDWARD LIU FOR PLAINTIFF CALVIN LOUIE
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY KATIE DANIELSON FOR DEFENDANT CHARLES ALAN PARSHALL

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: PARTIES STIPULATED THAT DEFENDANT IS TO PAY $1500 IN BACKRENT. DEFENDANT TO PAY $300 MONTHLY RENT STARTING 6/1/05 FOR 6 MONTHS AND STARTING ON 12/1/05 $300 MONTHLY RENT PLUS $50 TOWARD BACKRENT. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT RECEIVE MONEY FROM FAMILY, THEN $150 DUE ON 6/1/05 AND $150 DUE ON 6/15/05, AND THEN STARTING ON 7/1/05 $300 PER MONTH. ANY MONEY DEFENDANT RECEIVES FROM DISABILITY BENEFITS AND GIFTS FROM FAMILY TO BE APPLIED TO BALANCE OF BACKRENT. DEFENDANT TO REMAIN IN POSSESSION OF 438 BROADWAY ST #28.
IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT COMPLY, UPON EXPARTE APPLICATION AND 25 HOUR NOTICE, PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN JUDGMENT.

JUDGE PRO TEM:JOSEPH CARIGNAN ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER:BELDON YEE (218)

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
